name: 8-habit-ai-dev
description: Anti-Vibe-Coding workflow discipline: 24 markdown skills across a 7-step AI-assisted development workflow.

interface.longDescription: 8-Habit AI Dev adds a 7-step, spec-first workflow discipline for AI-assisted development: research, requirements, design, breakdown, implementation brief, review, deploy, and monitor. The plugin is markdown-only and tool-agnostic: skills guide the agent and human through better process without adding runtime enforcement.
defaultPrompt: Help me plan this feature with 8-Habit discipline.
Review this AI-generated change before I commit.
Run the 8-Habit cross-verify checklist on this plan.
